basics.name: César Fernández Milán
basics.label: Full Stack Developer · React/Next · Angular · Node · Java/Spring Boot · Python | AI in production
basics.summary: Full stack developer with a solid foundation in React/Next.js, Angular, Node.js, Java/Spring Boot, and Python. Before moving into software development, I spent over six years in telecommunications designing FTTH networks, an experience that gave me a methodical, systems-oriented way of working. Today I build complete applications, from the database to the interface, and work integrating AI models into production applications. I have developed end-to-end projects (e-commerce, a blog platform, AI-based workout generation, an autonomous job-scraping agent) applying client-server architectures, REST APIs, SQL databases, Docker, and version control with Git. I'm especially interested in backend and architecture. I want to keep growing in a team where I can contribute my technical experience and take on more responsibility.

work.name: Administración de Fincas Justicia
work.summary: In this project, I used WordPress as a CMS to develop a professional website. I was responsible for template customization, plugin configuration (Elementor and Easy Real Estate), Google Maps integration, and full site translation into Spanish using Loco Translate. I also optimized performance and SEO structure, ensuring a smooth experience on both mobile and desktop. Finally, I modified PHP functions and JS scripts to customize the theme and enhance website functionality.
highlights: Template and function customization in PHP
Google Maps integration and full translation to Spanish

projects.name: TrainIA
projects.description: Full-stack application for generating AI-based training plans, browsing training history, and regenerating routines from a modern Angular and Node.js interface.
highlights: OpenAI API with async generation flow

projects.name: AgentJobs
projects.description: Autonomous agent that collects job listings from LinkedIn, Indeed, InfoJobs, and Tecnoempleo, filters and scores them with AI (gpt-4o-mini) based on a developer profile, and delivers the top matches via Telegram twice a day.
highlights: AI scoring via OpenAI gpt-4o-mini with hard filters

projects.name: 3D Figures E-commerce
projects.description: Online store for 3D-printed figures and custom orders using Next.js and Strapi as a headless CMS.

projects.name: TrainLog
projects.description: Web application for workout management between managers and clients, built with Angular 21 on the frontend and Node.js + Express on the backend, using SQLite for data persistence.

projects.name: Full-Stack Blog (Angular & Spring Boot)
projects.description: Modern blog platform with full CRUD operations (Create, Read, Update, Delete) implemented with containerized monolithic architecture.

projects.name: To-Do List — Spring Boot MVC
projects.description: Web application for task management built with Java, Spring Boot, Thymeleaf, and MySQL.
